mapper.insert: INSERT INTO R_USER_NOTIFICATION_PREF_T ( USER_ID, NOTIFY_SNMP, NOTIFY_ICMP, NOTIFY_PORT, NOTIFY_CPU_MEM, NOTIFY_TRAFFIC, NOTIFY_URGENT, NOTIFY_CRITICAL, NOTIFY_MAJOR, NOTIFY_MINOR, NOTIFY_WARNING, SOUND_ENABLED, SOUND_VOLUME, SOUND_TYPE, BROWSER_NOTIFY, QUIET_ENABLED, QUIET_START_TIME, QUIET_END_TIME ) VALUES ( #{USER_ID}, #{NOTIFY_SNMP}, #{NOTIFY_ICMP}, #{NOTIFY_PORT}, #{NOTIFY_CPU_MEM}, #{NOTIFY_TRAFFIC}, #{NOTIFY_URGENT}, #{NOTIFY_CRITICAL}, #{NOTIFY_MAJOR}, #{NOTIFY_MINOR}, #{NOTIFY_WARNING}, #{SOUND_ENABLED}, #{SOUND_VOLUME}, #{SOUND_TYPE}, #{BROWSER_NOTIFY}, #{QUIET_ENABLED}, #{QUIET_START_TIME}, #{QUIET_END_TIME} )
mapper.update: UPDATE R_USER_NOTIFICATION_PREF_T SET NOTIFY_SNMP = #{NOTIFY_SNMP}, NOTIFY_ICMP = #{NOTIFY_ICMP}, NOTIFY_PORT = #{NOTIFY_PORT}, NOTIFY_CPU_MEM = #{NOTIFY_CPU_MEM}, NOTIFY_TRAFFIC = #{NOTIFY_TRAFFIC}, NOTIFY_URGENT = #{NOTIFY_URGENT}, NOTIFY_CRITICAL = #{NOTIFY_CRITICAL}, NOTIFY_MAJOR = #{NOTIFY_MAJOR}, NOTIFY_MINOR = #{NOTIFY_MINOR}, NOTIFY_WARNING = #{NOTIFY_WARNING}, SOUND_ENABLED = #{SOUND_ENABLED}, SOUND_VOLUME = #{SOUND_VOLUME}, SOUND_TYPE = #{SOUND_TYPE}, BROWSER_NOTIFY = #{BROWSER_NOTIFY}, QUIET_ENABLED = #{QUIET_ENABLED}, QUIET_START_TIME = #{QUIET_START_TIME}, QUIET_END_TIME = #{QUIET_END_TIME} WHERE USER_ID = #{USER_ID}
